footer.dashboard_text: Sign in to your CRG Direct dashboard at dashboard.crgdirect.co.uk to view your quote, track progress and manage your installation.

sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.content:
Following our recent site survey, we are pleased to present this tailored solar energy proposal for your property. Our assessment confirms your south-facing roof is ideally positioned for optimal solar generation, and we anticipate excellent energy yields throughout the year.

This system has been designed to maximise your self-consumption rate, significantly reducing your reliance on grid electricity and protecting you against future energy price increases.

sections.heading: System Components & Pricing

table_items.description: JA Solar 420W All-Black Mono PERC Panels

sections.notes: Includes: MCS certification, 10-year workmanship warranty, DNO application, G99 compliance testing, system monitoring setup, Bird guard mesh

sections.heading: Battery Storage Benefits
sections.content:
The GivEnergy 9.5kWh battery system included in this proposal allows you to:

- Store excess solar generation during the day for use in the evening
- Take advantage of off-peak electricity tariffs (charge overnight at low rates)
- Maintain power during grid outages with the Emergency Power Supply (EPS) feature
- Monitor and control your system remotely via the GivEnergy app

Based on typical usage patterns, we estimate the battery will increase your self-consumption from 35% to approximately 75%, dramatically reducing your electricity imports.

sections.heading: Terms & Next Steps
sections.content:
This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date shown above. To proceed:

- Confirm your acceptance by signing the enclosed installation agreement
- A deposit of 25% is required to secure your installation date
- CRG Direct will handle all DNO applications and approvals (typically 4-6 weeks)
- Installation is completed within 1-2 days, with minimal disruption
- Full commissioning, testing, and handover including app setup

All installations are carried out by MCS-certified engineers to the highest industry standards. For finance options, please speak with your account manager.
